authority_references.permitted_use: Shared renewal, rate-trajectory, serial-dependence, packet-boundary, and deterministic-seed semantics.
Direct Session 1 descriptive timing and packet-profile fields without refitting or treating them as a universal script.
Coordinated timing, duration, density, gain, and overlap interpretation; timing plus duration is strongest.
Parent authority for hash-inventoried audit-only training and validation event tables used by the Phase 5L packet grammar audit.
authority_references.source_field: training/validation event metadata and generated-file inventory

authority_references.permitted_use: Cautious structural interpretation of clean stepped runs, continuations, skips, reversals, and short bursts.
Baseline continuation texture, motif repetition, and descriptive grammar guidance.
Session 1 and Baseline packet-cycle, continuation-count, and continuation-spacing distributions.
Mode-architecture distinction and Complex-only plateau/gap reference; not Baseline cluster targets.
Terminology boundary: schedule spectra do not establish a continuous carrier.
Reproducible packet, density, and schedule-spectrum measurement semantics.

between_cluster_gap_model.definition: The onset gap from the final packet start of one merged phrase-active cluster to the first packet start of the next cluster in the same source block.

channel_coupling_rules.definition: Phrasing may coordinate packet selection and channel transitions only through canonical grammar and remappable Focus Role semantics. It may not hard-code a physical focus channel.

cluster_detection.definition: A phrase-active window contains four packet starts and the three exact sample-aligned inter-packet intervals between them. A validation window is phrase-active when its interval triple occurred in the training population. Overlapping or adjacent active windows are merged into one non-overlapping meso cluster.

prohibited_threshold_reuse.reason: The source field defines provisional same-channel packet trains, not gaps between canonical packet starts.

cluster_detection.runtime_rule: WGE-5B uses aggregate state transitions and distribution targets; it must not embed or replay the source phrase dictionary.

cluster_duration_model.definition: The onset span from the first through final packet start in a merged phrase-active cluster.

cluster_size_distribution.definition: Packet starts covered by each merged phrase-active cluster.

density_state_linkage.baseline_rule: Permit local stochastic density modulation using the recurrent phrase state. Direct Session 1 validation has phrase-cluster onset-span occupancy 0.704542 and quiet-gap onset-span occupancy 0.252784; these are advisory observations, not exact runtime quotas.
density_state_linkage.complex_mode_rule: Complex macro states remain a separate architecture and are not imported into Baseline.
density_state_linkage.definition: Meso phrasing may modulate local packet rate and selection within Baseline while remaining distinct from Complex Mode macro gating.

future_acceptance_gates.requirement: Every realised packet continues to pass existing grammar structure validation.
Same profile, duration, and seed produce byte-identical plans and cluster annotations.
Primary and at least two holdout seeds pass structural gates and source comparisons; exact cross-seed equality is forbidden.
Packet intervals retain non-zero variance and no phrase category creates a session-wide fixed cadence.
No oscillator or carrier control is introduced; schedule periodicity remains neutrally labelled.
Compare against direct Session 1 validation 15.3888 clusters per observed minute and its 8.1029-22.3675 per-block empirical band; report Baseline separately.
Generated packet-count quantiles must be compared with direct Session 1 validation p10/p50/p90 of 4/6/17.4 and the observed block ranges.
Generated p10/p50/p90 must be compared using equivalent packet-start semantics with direct Session 1 validation 0.215315/0.281917/0.351144 seconds.
Generated p10/p50/p90 must be compared using equivalent packet-start semantics with direct Session 1 validation 0.442194/0.783469/2.2062 seconds.
Compare phrase-cluster onset-span and quiet-gap onset-span occupancy with direct Session 1 validation 0.704542 and 0.252784; do not reuse Complex Mode deep-gap targets.
Validation phrase-active share should be compared with direct Session 1 0.397554 and Baseline aggregate 0.651550 while source interval tuples remain unavailable to runtime.
Each phrase retains stochastic variation and the aggregate avoids a narrow artificial periodicity.
Use the same source and generated schedule measurement population; otherwise report not assessable.
Monitor exact adjacent repetition and diversity against direct Session 1 validation cluster-conditioned repetition 0.691517.
Preserve canonical grammar and compare same/+1/reverse/skip transition shares with direct Session 1 validation 0.844473/0.149743/0.003213/0.002571.
Remain finite, reported, and no greater than the direct Session 1 validation observation of 3 unless later authority expands the range; no overlap is added merely to create sustained texture.
No major assessable meso timing or phrase metric may remain outside source reference.

overlap_constraints.definition: Overlap is a coordinated diagnostic dimension but gain alone or overlap alone cannot define the perceived texture. Frozen samples, calibration, and event gains remain unchanged.

phrase_selection_weights.definition: Session 1 phrase-state occupancy is measured by training-to-validation recurrent three-interval windows. Packet grammar selection remains governed by the existing Session 1 planning profile.

provisional_fields: runtime phrase-state parameterization from advisory source observations
runtime phrase-category mapping above canonical packet grammar
binding tolerances beyond observed training/validation empirical bands

repetition_rules.definition: Exact motif repetition may contribute to local texture and is permitted. Direct Session 1 validation phrase clusters have 0.691517 exact adjacent asset repetition; diversity safeguards remain active.

rhythmic_phrase_categories.definition: Multiple canonical packets sustaining clean circular +1 continuation texture without a global fixed lattice.
A local multi-packet phrase containing scattered continuations, skips, reversals, or short impulse bursts.
A recurrent four-or-more-packet phrase identified from exact three-interval recurrence in training and measured on held-out validation blocks, with no session-wide lattice.
A transition from a merged phrase-active packet span to the next phrase-active span; direct Session 1 validation gap median is 0.783469 seconds.

seed_and_determinism.definition: All phrase, transition, and packet draws use deterministic stage seeds and explicit draw coordinates without global RNG state.
seed_and_determinism.different_seed_requirement: Different seeds produce different valid phrase schedules.

session_boundary_handling.definition: Clusters and phrases may not cross session boundaries. Events remain inside duration and are never compressed against the end boundary.

source_packet_start_population.channel_handling: All channel rows are merged and sorted within each source block. Each packet_start row is one source packet start; no simultaneous duplicate starts occur.
source_packet_start_population.definition: A packet_start event begins one packet and following continuation rows belong to it until the next packet_start in the same source block.
source_packet_start_population.overlap_handling: Overlapping source events remain members of their packet; overlap does not create or merge packet starts.

phrase_state_model.cluster_rule: Convert each active phrase window to its four covered packet starts, then merge overlapping or adjacent packet spans within a source block.
phrase_state_model.phrase_window: Three successive exact sample-aligned packet intervals spanning four packet starts.
phrase_state_model.reference_dictionary_scope: Training interval triples are counted separately for direct Session 1 and Baseline Sessions 1-4.
phrase_state_model.runtime_boundary: Runtime uses aggregate state transitions and target distributions only. It must not store, hard-code, or replay source interval triples or source block sequences.
phrase_state_model.validation_rule: A validation phrase window is active when its exact three-interval tuple appeared at least once in the corresponding training population.

source_supported_parameters.measurement_method: Count validation three-interval windows whose exact sample tuple appears in direct Session 1 training blocks.
Count validation three-interval windows whose exact sample tuple appears in Baseline Sessions 1-4 training blocks.
First-order transition count over direct Session 1 validation phrase-state windows, preserving source-block boundaries.
First-order transition count over direct Session 1 validation phrase-state windows, preserving source-block boundaries.
Merged phrase-active cluster count divided by summed within-block packet-start support.
Quantiles of packet counts in merged direct Session 1 validation phrase-active clusters.
Quantiles of final packet-start onset minus first packet-start onset in each merged cluster.
Quantiles of packet-start intervals whose endpoints lie inside a merged direct Session 1 cluster.
Quantiles of next-cluster first packet onset minus prior-cluster final packet onset within a validation block.
Sum cluster onset spans divided by summed within-block packet-start support.
Sum between-cluster onset gaps divided by summed within-block packet-start support.
Quantiles of source metadata event rows assigned to packets inside each merged cluster.
source_supported_parameters.source_field: events grouped by packet starts inside merged clusters

source_supported_parameters.measurement_method: Exact adjacent asset equality over source event rows within merged clusters.
Adjacent source event channel steps within merged direct Session 1 clusters.
Maximum sweep-line concurrency of source event onset/end rows inside merged clusters.
Total source duration with concurrency of at least two inside direct Session 1 validation clusters.
Minimum and maximum across the four direct Session 1 validation source blocks.
Minimum and maximum cluster rates across the four direct Session 1 validation source blocks.
source_supported_parameters.source_field: per-block merged cluster count / packet-start support

macro.definition: Longer session density-state evolution. Quantitative plateau/gap values are Complex Mode Tier 2 references and are not Baseline targets.

meso.authority: WGE-4C human observation plus source scheduler architecture
meso.boundary: Four packet starts define a three-interval phrase window; overlapping or adjacent phrase-active windows merge into a cluster.
meso.definition: Locally grouped packets, repeated rhythmic phrases, dense runs, and quiet releases above packet grammar and below macro session evolution.

micro.authority: x_alpha_pulse_pattern_grammar_v1 and direct Session 1 pulse analysis
micro.definition: Immutable motif-internal samples and within-packet event/continuation timing.

packet.authority: x_alpha_pulse_pattern_grammar_v1 and direct Session 1 pulse analysis
packet.definition: One packet start followed by zero or more continuations until the next packet start.

transition_rules.definition: Phrase states modulate packet scheduling and selection through a stochastic profile. Transitions use explicit probabilities or duration distributions, preserve serial dependence, and never encode an exact source sequence.

unresolved_fields: perceptual identity of individual phrase categories
binding tolerances beyond observed training/validation empirical bands

within_cluster_interval_model.definition: A stochastic, source-conditioned packet-onset model with phrase-state persistence, rate trajectory, and limited serial dependence. It must not be a fixed interval cell or reuse within-packet continuation spacing.
